title_en_from_sorftime: Ikarao Smart Karaoke Machine for Adults - with Lyrics Display, 32GB Karaoke Tablet, 2 Wireless Mics, Professional Karaoke System, 300W Peak Power, 4 DJ Lights, Karaoke Speaker for Any Occasion
bullets_en_from_sorftime: No set up hassle: Truly all-in-one karaoke machine with screen. Effortlessly set up your karaoke party with a compact design housing a 10.1-inch tablet, two wireless microphones with self-charging, and bluetooth speaker for party with 300W peak power
Endless karaoke songs: link to the built-in YouTube and karaoke APP via WiFi, with over 10,000,000+ songs in any language
Built-in 10.1-inch karaoke tablet: HD resolution, ultra-sensitive touch and 180-degree rotation
Hidden microphone storage space with automatic charging; no need to pair the mics or go through extra connection steps
High-quality sound: reduced resonance distortion, enhanced bass ambience, clearer sound and 8 hours of party time
aplus_key_claims: 8 hours, 300W peak power and 4 light effects
HDMI, USB, AUX, TF and two MIC/GUITAR interfaces

aplus_faq_claims.screen: Built-in Android 13, 10.1-inch screen with WiFi and Bluetooth
aplus_faq_claims.battery: 4 hours to full charge; microphone 30 hours and machine 8 hours at 60% volume
aplus_faq_claims.tv_connection: HDMI, USB 3.0 and AUX; connects to TV, DJ, guitars and karaoke equipment
aplus_faq_claims.apps: YouTube, KaraFun and Spotify pre-installed; Smule and StarMaker planned
